channel.title: onlinetest release feed
channel.description: New releases and changelog feed of onlinetest
channel.copyright: All rights reserved 2022, Peter Hedenskog and team

item.title: onlinetest 3.3.0
item.description:
Added
- Refreshed the vendored compare bundle with a sharing pass, accurate transfer-size diffs and style recalculation visibility:

Fixed
- Filmstrip and Visual Progress thumbnails no longer 404 — frame timestamps are now derived from the same _visualMetrics.VisualProgress change points sitespeed.io's own report uses, matching the cadence sitespeed.io actually wrote to disk.
- Millisecond timings in the page-x-ray diff are rounded to whole ms — the new recalc duration field reports sub-ms precision ("17.099 ms") that's noise at this scale.
- "Switch HAR" and run-dropdown changes preserve the previous source URLs / config / stripVersion choice, so the Share UI doesn't downgrade from "Copy share link" to "Download bundle" on every toggle.

item.title: onlinetest 3.2.0
item.description:
Added
- Refreshed the vendored compare bundle to pick up the upstream regression-spotting pass:

item.title: onlinetest 3.1.1
item.description:
Fixed
- Filmstrip and Visual Progress thumbnails no longer point at non-existent screenshots. The frame timestamps are now derived from _visualMetrics.VisualProgress change points — the authoritative list of frames sitespeed.io actually wrote to disk — instead of speculating a 100 ms grid that breaks on runs with a flat visual-progress stretch #235.
- Theme and admin CSS now cache-bust on each release via ?v=<server-version> stamped on the <link rel="stylesheet"> hrefs. Previously a patch release that only touched the theme CSS could sit in browser caches until the unrelated 30-day cache header expired #234.

item.title: onlinetest 3.0.3
item.description:
Fixed
- Fix spinning /result page when a queued test is in active state #228.

item.title: onlinetest 3.0.2
item.description:
Fixed
- Shorten the URL input placeholder so the allowed-domain regex hint fits on narrower viewports #227.

item.title: onlinetest 3.0.1
item.description:
Fixed
- Show the configured allowedDomain regex in the URL input placeholder so users can see which URLs are accepted #225.
- Fix broken status polling and missing fonts on the running page #226.

item.title: onlinetest 3.0.0
item.description:
Added
- Collect metrics from the server and make it available for Prometheus #213.
- New API endpoint to retrieve the full Browsertime JSON for a completed test via GET /api/result/:id #217.
- Two configurable GUI themes: console (default) and memphis, selected via html.theme in server.yaml #224.
- Lazy-load the Ace editor so it only fetches when the Scripting tab is opened; first paint of the start page drops by roughly 700 KB #224.
- Searchable picker of all sitespeed.io CLI flags in the Command line tab #224.
- Significant accessibility improvements: skip links, real labels, ARIA tablist with arrow-key navigation, modal focus trap, role attributes, aria-current on nav, aria-busy/aria-live on the running page, ≥44 px touch targets, prefers-reduced-motion, /-to-focus and ⌘↵-to-submit shortcuts #224.
- Added step-security/harden-runner to all GitHub Actions workflows #222.

Fixed
- Smarter URL matching in scripting validation: now handles both single and double quotes, and whitespace inside commands.measure.start(...) / commands.navigate(...) calls #211.
- Better error handling in the API result endpoint #218.

Changed
- Replaced the Bulma CSS framework with a hand-written design system — drops ~250 KB of vendor CSS. Custom CSS overrides targeting Bulma classes will need to be rewritten #224.
- Default sitespeed.io Docker image bumped from 39 to 40 in .env.example.
- Pinned GitHub Actions to specific commit SHAs for supply-chain security #220.
- Switched the API Docker workflow's harden-runner egress policy to block #223.

item.title: onlinetest 2.0.0
item.description:
Added
- Docker containers now uses NodeJS 24 #173.
- German translations, thank you Tobi for PR #174.
- Translations: Arabic, Bengali, Spanish, French, Hindi, Portuguese, Russian, Urdu, Simplified Chinese thank you Tobi for PR #181.
- Basic Auth for admin now uses .env file and will warn in the logs if no auth is setup #205.

Fixed
- Make sure the configuratiomn (nconf) is never accessed before configuration files is read #177.
- Bump Postgres to latest version #172
- Fix correct path to scripting file #167.
- Update to sitespeed.io 39 #171.
- Use Trixie as base image #185.
- Simplify how we do releases #206
- The webserver port was hardcoded, fixed in #204.
- Renamed the default yaml files for server and testrunner #199

Changed
- Rename defaulLocale configuration to locale #178. If you used localization:defaultLocale that is now localization:locale.
- Updated minio to latest release. There are some changes on startup so check the PR and update your docker compose accordingly #163.
- Switched to default use Redis instead of KeyDB since Redis is Open Source again #169.
- Reworked the docker compose files #200 #202 #203
- Always use .env if it exists for both the server and the testrunner (and the compose files) #190.
